project_type: Node.js + Express + Socket.io real-time terminal-style chat app
test_framework: Mocha + Chai with socket.io-client for integration tests
verification_instructions: Run npm test to execute all mocha tests. All 15 existing tests plus new tests must pass.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js v22 available via nvm.
contribution_requirements: Use --include=dev when installing to get devDependencies (mocha, chai, socket.io-client).
key_patterns: Tests follow pattern: require server, listen on port 0, use socket.io-client to connect, emit events, assert responses. Each test file has its own before/after hooks for server lifecycle. Helpers: connect(), joinRoom(), waitForEvent(). Frontend is a single index.html with inline CSS and JS.
relevant_files: public/index.html - single-file frontend with all CSS and JS inline
README.md - used as test data source (55 lines of project documentation)
directory_structure: Root: server.js (backend), public/index.html (frontend), tests/ (mocha test files), README.md, package.json
